open_p1.blocker: The GO-closure candidate has not yet passed exact-head remote CI, registry publication/signature verification, artifact download inspection, and a fresh-clone proof.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Draft PR exact head passes every required job; digest-pinned candidate/prior images, SBOMs, signatures and attestations verify; downloaded artifacts verify; fresh clone make ci and proof pass.

open_p1.blocker: No persistent private TLS staging endpoint or persistent data plane is available.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Deploy the exact candidate digest to the supplied host/DNS/TLS boundary and pass external health, source identity, auth, storage, lifecycle, and both workload probes.

open_p1.blocker: Prior-digest rollback, forward recovery, restart storm, and 24-hour soak have not executed against persistent state and two Metal agents.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Run all four immutable harnesses, preserve duration/restart/source/state receipts, and meet the configured invariant and SLO thresholds.

open_p1.blocker: No encrypted backup has been uploaded across an independent provider/credential boundary and restored from an independently downloaded copy.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Upload only ciphertext, independently download/decrypt in isolation, restore database and objects, and match checksums plus application/ledger invariants.

open_p1.blocker: The full Stripe test-mode payment, refund, dispute, Connect restriction, payout hold/release/failure, replay/out-of-order webhook, and provider reconciliation matrix has not run.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Execute every scenario with sk_test/whsec test credentials and distinct endpoint secrets; preserve redacted provider IDs and reconciliation receipts.

open_p1.blocker: No synthetic alert has fired, deduplicated, been acknowledged, resolved, and delivered through a genuine receiver.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Preserve redacted receiver delivery IDs and firing, acknowledgement, deduplication, and resolution timestamps.

open_p1.blocker: Two approved synthetic buyers, two operator-controlled Metal workers, and the strict scenario/restart adapters are unavailable.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Exercise the complete counted scenario matrix within every fail-closed limit, including kill switches, revocations, restore, alert, reconciliation, result retrieval during intake pause, and no payout export.

open_p1.blocker: No non-author collaborator with repository review authority is available to approve the exact-head closure PR.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Named eligible reviewer independently inspects evidence and grants the required exact-head approval with no unresolved thread.

open_p1.blocker: Qualified approvals for the bounded test canary and named human incident coverage are absent.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Supply an exact-candidate governance bundle conforming to ops/governance-approval-bundle.schema.json with all eight named approvals.

open_p1.blocker: Support/security tabletops, DSAR export/deletion, backup tombstone, and asset/model provenance closure have no PASS receipts.
open_p1.exit_criterion: Execute all five exercises and bind evidence to the exact candidate in the same governance approval bundle.

out_of_scope_p0.containment: Independent supplier ownership is prohibited; only two operator-controlled Metal devices and synthetic data may enter the Level B canary.
out_of_scope_p0.expansion_exit_criterion: Contracts, verified location, destination-pinned egress, confidentiality, data governance, and attestation risk must be separately approved before expansion.

tag_policy: Do not create v0.1.0-rc.1 or any release tag while the Level B decision is NO_GO.
merge_policy: Keep the GO-closure pull request draft and unmerged while any target-scope P1 remains open.
